creator: wollman@khavrinen.lcs.mit.edu
text:
<<On Thu, 8 Nov 2001 00:31:41 -0800 (PST), Vladimir Birjukov <prg51@morics.riga.post.lv> said:

> There is changes according  of the Cabinet of Ministers of the Rep. of
> Latvia from 2001. January, 9 Nr 18.  The 2000 year was only one without summer time in Latvia. Since 2001
> summer time. Now, summer time applayed again by Europe rules for second
> time zone.

Please check whether the information for Latvia in
<ftp://elsie.nci.nih.gov/pub/tzdata2001d.tar.gz> is correct.  If it
is, let us know; if not, please make your request to the maintainers
of the timezone database at <tz@elsie.nci.nih.gov>.

-GAWollman
